title: although / though / even though + S + V（讓步子句）

formulas.formula: Although/Though/Even though + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 雖然……但是……；讓步副詞子句表達轉折關係
主句在前，讓步子句在後（though 可置句尾）

explanation: 讓步副詞子句用來表達兩個相對立的事實。Although、though、even though 都可引導讓步子句，但 even though 語氣最強，強調事實的對比性。關鍵注意：讓步子句與主句不能同時使用 but；though 具有靈活性，可置於句首或句尾；although 通常置於句首。此句型考察轉折邏輯與複句結構掌握。

examples.eng: Although she studied hard, she failed the exam.
examples.chi: 雖然她很用功，但她仍然考試不及格。

examples.eng: Even though the weather was terrible, the event proceeded as planned.
examples.chi: 儘管天氣很糟糕，這項活動仍按計劃進行。

examples.eng: Though he was rich, he lived a simple life.
examples.chi: 雖然他很富有，但他過著簡樸的生活。

examples.eng: She succeeded in her dream, though many people doubted her.
examples.chi: 她實現了夢想，儘管許多人懷疑她。

extension.tip: 容易混淆點：although/though/even though 引導子句（後接 S+V），而 despite/in spite of 為介詞，後接名詞或動名詞。不可將讓步子句與 but 同用；若已用 although，不需再用 but。though 置於句尾時語氣較輕鬆。

examples.test: ❌ Although he studied hard, but he failed.
examples.result: → ✅ Although he studied hard, he failed. 或 He studied hard, but he failed.（不可同時使用 although 與 but）

examples.test: ❌ Even though his difficulty, he never gave up.
examples.result: → ✅ Even though he had difficulties, he never gave up. 或 Despite his difficulties, he never gave up.（difficulty 後需接 had；或改用介詞 despite）

examples.test: ✅ He went to work, though he was sick.
examples.result: → though 置於句尾，語氣輕鬆自然，表達「不過他生病了」

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「Although/Though 接完整子句，不與 but 為友；Despite/In spite of 接名詞詞組。」

exercises.sentence: He won the award even though many competitors were more experienced.
exercises.translation: 儘管許多競爭對手經驗更豐富，他仍然贏得了獎項。

parts: it was raining heavily, the children played outside happily.
exercises.sentence: Although it was raining heavily, the children played outside happily.
exercises.translation: 雖然下著大雨，孩子們仍然開心地在外面玩耍。

parts: She decided to pursue her passion for art,
exercises.sentence: She decided to pursue her passion for art, though her parents opposed the idea.
exercises.translation: 她決定追求對藝術的熱情，儘管她的父母反對這個想法。

exercises.sentence: The project was completed successfully even though the team faced numerous obstacles.
exercises.translation: 儘管團隊遇到了許多障礙，該項目仍然順利完成了。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的讓步連接詞完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ he was very tired, he continued working on the project.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 Although。句子表達「儘管他很累，他仍然繼續工作」，這是讓步關係。Although 正確表達兩個相對立的事實。B 項 Because 表因果關係不符；C 項 Since 表原因或時間；D 項 While 通常表時間對比，不如 Although 強調讓步。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句子中讓步子句與主句的搭配是否正確
mc_exercises.question_eng: Even though the ticket price was expensive, but many people bought them _______.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 anyway（B）。但題目句結構有誤，不能同時使用 even though 與 but。應修改為「Even though the ticket price was expensive, many people bought them anyway.」或「Because the ticket price was expensive, but many people bought them anyway.」A/C/D 雖都是副詞但不符語境。需要 anyway 來補充讓步意味。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當選項，並考量 although 與 even though 語氣的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the heavy rain, the construction work was not delayed at all.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 Even though（A）。句子強調「儘管下大雨這個相當不利的情況，工程仍未延誤」，even though 語氣最強，強調對比性。Although 也可用但語氣較弱。C 項 Despite of 錯誤（應為 Despite）；D 項 In spite though 非正確搭配。句型需要連接詞引導完整子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合應用：正確使用讓步子句，辨別複句結構與語法
mc_exercises.question_eng: Though he had received several job offers from prestigious companies, he decided to _______ for further education instead of starting work immediately.

options.text: apply because of his strong academic background
although his family disagreed with this choice
so that he could gain more experience

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。Though 引導的讓步子句「Though he had received several job offers...」應搭配邏輯清晰的主句動詞及受詞，「pursue his master's degree」完整表達主句意思。A 項不適合作動詞受詞；C 項錯誤（不能加另一個 although 子句）；D 項引入目的但破壞句子原意。題目測試複句結構的完整性與邏輯一致性。
